_meta.purpose: Curated sample items for partner-side seeding. Replaces the generic 'Sample text 1' deterministic generator with realistic, slug-aware data so the editor's preview + test-chat blocks make sense at first glance.
_meta.schema: Each top-level key is a relay schema slug. Value is an array of items in ModuleItem shape: { name, description, category, price, currency, isActive, images, fields }. Items beyond what the schema declares are kept in `fields` and ignored by block renderers — safe over-coverage.
_meta.edit: Free to add new slugs / items. Slugs not present here fall back to the deterministic generator in relay-sample-data-actions.ts.

food_beverage_menu.name: Margherita Pizza
food_beverage_menu.description: Naples-style pie with San Marzano tomato, fresh mozzarella di bufala, basil from our garden, and a drizzle of extra-virgin olive oil.

food_beverage_menu.name: Truffle Risotto
food_beverage_menu.description: Creamy Carnaroli rice slow-cooked with white wine, finished with shaved black truffle and aged parmigiano.

food_beverage_menu.name: Grilled Branzino
food_beverage_menu.description: Whole Mediterranean sea bass, salt-baked and finished over coals, with lemon, capers, and roasted fennel.

food_beverage_beverage.name: House Espresso
food_beverage_beverage.description: Single-origin Ethiopian beans, pulled short and intense — served with a small biscotti.

food_beverage_beverage.name: Aperol Spritz
food_beverage_beverage.description: Aperol, prosecco, and a splash of soda over ice with an orange wheel — the original Italian aperitivo.

food_beverage_beverage.name: Sparkling Water
food_beverage_beverage.description: 750ml Acqua Panna or San Pellegrino, served chilled.

food_beverage_booking.name: Window table for 2
food_beverage_booking.description: Two-top by the front windows — best for a quiet date night.

food_beverage_booking.name: Outdoor patio for 4
food_beverage_booking.description: Heated patio table under string lights — pet-friendly section.

food_beverage_booking.name: Private dining for 8
food_beverage_booking.description: Private back room with dedicated server — ideal for celebrations or business dinners.

food_beverage_marketing.name: Happy Hour
food_beverage_marketing.description: Half-price cocktails and select small plates, every weekday from 5–7pm at the bar.

food_beverage_marketing.name: Date Night Special
food_beverage_marketing.description: Three-course tasting menu for two with a bottle of house wine — Friday and Saturday only.

food_beverage_marketing.name: Sunday Brunch Mimosa
food_beverage_marketing.description: Free mimosa with any brunch entrée, every Sunday until 2pm.

food_beverage_info.name: Hours of operation
food_beverage_info.description: Monday–Friday 11am–10pm, Saturday–Sunday 10am–11pm. Last seating 30 minutes before close.

food_beverage_info.name: Location & Parking
food_beverage_info.description: 123 Main Street, San Francisco. Validated parking in the adjacent garage; street parking available after 6pm.

food_beverage_info.name: Dress code & policies
food_beverage_info.description: Smart casual. We require advance notice for parties over 8. Children welcome before 8pm.

food_beverage_people.name: Chef Marco Rossi
food_beverage_people.description: Executive Chef. Trained in Bologna, ten years at Eleven Madison Park before opening here. Specializes in modern Italian.

food_beverage_people.name: Alice Chen
food_beverage_people.description: Wine Director. Court of Master Sommeliers Advanced certification. Curates a 200-label list with strong Italian and Burgundian focus.

food_beverage_people.name: Sophia Williams
food_beverage_people.description: Pastry Chef. Pastry Chef of the Year 2023 (SF Magazine). Famous for the seasonal tasting flight.

awards: Pastry Chef of the Year 2023 (SF Magazine)

food_beverage_social_proof.name: Sarah K.
food_beverage_social_proof.description: “Best risotto I’ve had outside of Milan. The truffle was real and generous, the rice perfectly al dente. Already booked our anniversary here.”

food_beverage_social_proof.name: Michael R.
food_beverage_social_proof.description: “Romantic atmosphere, attentive but unobtrusive staff, and the wine pairing made the whole night. Easy 5 stars.”

food_beverage_social_proof.name: Jenny L.
food_beverage_social_proof.description: “The chef’s table was unforgettable — six courses, each paired thoughtfully. Worth every dollar.”

food_beverage_events.name: Wine Pairing Night — Tuscany
food_beverage_events.description: Five-course menu paired with five Tuscan wines. Sommelier Alice walks the table through each pour.

food_beverage_events.name: Chef’s Table Saturday
food_beverage_events.description: Six-course chef’s tasting at the kitchen counter — Marco cooks in front of you. Limited to four guests per night.

food_beverage_events.name: Easter Sunday Brunch
food_beverage_events.description: Family-style brunch with a kids’ menu and live jazz trio. Reservations strongly recommended.

food_beverage_preferences.name: Gluten-Free
food_beverage_preferences.description: 12 menu items are naturally gluten-free; another 8 can be prepared GF on request. Dedicated fryer.

food_beverage_preferences.name: Vegan
food_beverage_preferences.description: Six fully vegan options across appetizers, mains, and desserts. Plant-based wine list also available.

food_beverage_preferences.name: Nut Allergy
food_beverage_preferences.description: Nuts are used in our pastry kitchen. Notify your server and we’ll route around them — most savory dishes are nut-free already.

food_beverage_operations.name: Kitchen prep schedule
food_beverage_operations.description: Mise-en-place starts at 14:00 daily. Pantry, sauce, grill, and pastry stations stagger through opening.

food_beverage_operations.name: Front-of-house briefing
food_beverage_operations.description: Pre-shift huddle at 16:30 — covers VIP reservations, 86’d items, allergens, and the night’s wine focus.

food_beverage_operations.name: Closing checklist
food_beverage_operations.description: Last seating at 22:00. Kitchen breakdown, deep clean, walk-in temp log, and the next day’s order list filed before lockup.

food_beverage_ordering.name: In-house dining order
food_beverage_ordering.description: Standard table order routed to the kitchen via POS. Course timing is flagged by the server.

food_beverage_ordering.name: Online pickup order
food_beverage_ordering.description: Web/app order with a 25-minute prep window. Customer collects at the bar host stand.

food_beverage_ordering.name: Delivery partner order
food_beverage_ordering.description: Routed via DoorDash / Uber Eats. Marked priority during peak Friday/Saturday windows so dine-in stays on time.

shared_marketing.name: Brand Story
shared_marketing.description: Our headline pitch — what makes us different in three lines. Delivered as the opening message of every chat.

fields.headline: Hand-crafted Italian, served the way Marco grew up eating it.

shared_marketing.name: Featured Promotion
shared_marketing.description: The single offer surfaced when a customer asks about deals. Refreshed weekly.

shared_marketing.name: Loyalty Program
shared_marketing.description: Repeat-customer perks announced in chat after the second visit. One free dessert per ten meals.

fields.headline: Visit ten times, dessert is on us

shared_checkout.name: Standard Checkout
shared_checkout.description: Default cart-to-payment flow with split-bill and tip-percentage options.

shared_checkout.name: Pay at Table
shared_checkout.description: Server delivers a QR code at end of meal; customer pays without flagging anyone down.

shared_checkout.name: Deposit Hold
shared_checkout.description: Used for private dining and large parties. Holds a configurable amount; balance settled on the night.

shared_confirmation.name: Booking Confirmation
shared_confirmation.description: Emailed and shown in chat after a reservation is locked. Includes the calendar add-to-cal link and address map.

shared_confirmation.name: Order Confirmation
shared_confirmation.description: Sent immediately after a pickup or delivery order. Shows ticket number, ETA, and what to do if anything’s missing.

fields.headline: Order received — kitchen is on it.

shared_confirmation.name: Cancellation Confirmation
shared_confirmation.description: Confirms a reservation or order has been cancelled, with the refund window if applicable.

shared_conversation.name: Welcome message
shared_conversation.description: What a customer sees the moment they open chat. Sets the tone, offers the first three things they can ask.

fields.welcome_message: Welcome! How can we make tonight great?
fields.prompt_text: Try: see the menu · book a table · today's specials

shared_conversation.name: Smart nudge
shared_conversation.description: Non-blocking suggestion shown after a reply — e.g. "Pair this with a glass of Barolo?". Tap-able, dismissible.

fields.headline: Pair this with a glass of Barolo?
fields.body: Marco recommends it with the truffle risotto.

shared_conversation.name: Quick replies
shared_conversation.description: Tappable suggestion chips shown alongside the bot’s message. Drives the conversation forward without typing.

fields.prompt_text: What would you like to do?

shared_navigation.name: Quick actions
shared_navigation.description: The four primary verbs always available in chat: Menu, Reserve, Order, Find us. Tap any one to jump.

shared_navigation.name: Contact card
shared_navigation.description: Phone, email, address, and hours — surfaced when the customer asks how to reach you outside chat.

shared_navigation.name: Footer links
shared_navigation.description: Secondary links shown at the end of long answers — privacy, accessibility, full hours.
